title: Sell in a Controlled Way
description: Master the techniques for controlled, disciplined selling that builds trust and reduces risk

content.title: Disciplined Sales Execution
content.subtitle: Control the sales process to increase win rates

content.text: Controlled selling means managing every step of the sales process with intention and discipline. It's about moving at the customer's pace while maintaining momentum, asking the right questions before proposing solutions, and ensuring alignment at each stage.

stages.label: 1. Establish Scope
stages.description: Define what success looks like and the scope of the engagement

stages.label: 2. Qualify Thoroughly
stages.description: Verify need, budget, timeline, and decision-making process before proposing

stages.label: 3. Present Custom Solution
stages.description: Position a solution tailored to their specific needs and constraints

stages.label: 4. Secure Commitment
stages.description: Move from proposal to signed contract with clear next steps

mistakes.whyHarmful: Leads to rejected proposals and longer sales cycles
Results in deals that stall or fall through at the last moment

mistakes.text: Moving forward with single decision maker
mistakes.whyHarmful: Risks losing deals to internal political changes

items: Controlled selling means following a repeatable process at each stage
Qualify before you propose—it saves time and increases win rates
Maintain momentum while respecting the customer's pace
Document decisions and agreements to avoid misalignment

keyTakeaways: Controlled selling means following a repeatable process at each stage
Qualify before you propose—it saves time and increases win rates
Maintain momentum while respecting the customer's pace
Document decisions and agreements to avoid misalignment
